title: Manage cultural processes in an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander organisation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage cultural processes in an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander organisation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes

pcs.text: Identify and document the framework or organisational structure for the organisation or Community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document the framework or organisational structure for the organisation or Community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document the framework or organisational structure for the organisation or Community.

pcs.text: Define and document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes.

pcs.text: Define and document non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and document non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and document non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes.

pcs.text: Record and analyse differences between the management structures and management processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and analyse differences between the management structures and management processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and analyse differences between the management structures and management processes.

pcs.text: Investigate ways of applying Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes to legal frameworks under which an organisation operates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate ways of applying Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes to legal frameworks under which an organisation operates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate ways of applying Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes to legal frameworks under which an organisation operates.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander management processes

elements.title: Analyse the impact of a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander framework on an organisation's structure

pcs.text: Identify and analyse requirements of a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander framework and legislative requirements for the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse requirements of a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander framework and legislative requirements for the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse requirements of a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander framework and legislative requirements for the organisation.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ways of working

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander ways of working.

pcs.text: Identify and record potential conflicts in relation to an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander organisation working within a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record potential conflicts in relation to an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander organisation working within a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record potential conflicts in relation to an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander organisation working within a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander structure.

pcs.text: Identify and implement strategies to negotiate through the conflict
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement strategies to negotiate through the conflict?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement strategies to negotiate through the conflict.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Analyse the impact of a non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander framework on an organisation's structure
